primary_outcomes.description: Measurement of extent of corneal staining using Fluorescein, blue light, yellow filter, full beam, medium magnification on a scale 0-4 (0=no staining, 1 = 1-15% of area, 2= 16-30% of area, 3=31-45% of area, 4=\>45% of area).
